disclaimer.en: LiveBench publishes independently scored, frequently refreshed objective tasks. Category scores are shown separately.
disclaimer.zh: LiveBench 发布独立评分、定期更新的客观任务。各类别分数独立展示。

disclaimer.en: This result concerns an agent configuration and repository issue resolution, not generic chat coding.
disclaimer.zh: 该结果针对特定代理配置和仓库问题解决，不代表通用聊天式编程能力。

sources.name: Arena
sources.authority: Official leaderboard via structured community mirror

disclaimer.en: Arena has no official public API. Data is read from a daily structured mirror and always links back to the official leaderboard.
disclaimer.zh: Arena 没有官方公开 API。数据来自每日结构化镜像，并始终链接回官方排行榜。
